title: PitchBook Data FOIA Request: University of Kentucky Endowment

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Kentucky Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am currently seeking updated quarterly performance data from your plan’s alternative asset holdings for the following date(s): 1Q16,3Q20,1Q25,2Q25,3Q25,4Q25 & 1Q26.
As always, thank you in advance for taking the time to send the requested documents. Below is the formal request.
On behalf of PitchBook Data, Inc., under Kentucky Open Records Act, I request a copy of the quarterly public records from 1Q16,3Q20,1Q25,2Q25,3Q25,4Q25 & 1Q26 for the following information, preferably in Excel or PDF format.
1.	Names and vintage years of all private equity, venture capital, mezzanine, distressed, real estate/REIT, debt and infrastructure partnerships in University of Kentucky Endowment's portfolio.
2.	Commitments made to each partnership.
3.	Contributions drawn down since inception.
4.	Distributions made to University of Kentucky Endowment to date by each individual partnership.
5.	Net Asset Value of each partnership.
6.	Internal rates of return (IRRs) for each partnership with and without the use of credit facility. Please note if the IRRs are not net.
7.	Investment multiple (TV/PI) for each individual partnership.
8.	The dollar amount of “total management fees and costs paid” for each individual partnership.
9.	Date as of which all the above data was calculated.
10.	Names of all alternative asset partnerships partially and fully sold by University of Kentucky Endowment, including date of sale.
11.	For each fund, please indicate whether or not the fund uses Subscription Credit Facilities.
I also request a copy of any disclosable documents which contain some or all of the following information:
12.	Names of all hedge fund holdings (including hedge fund of funds) in University of Kentucky Endowment's portfolio.
13.	Month by Month Market Value for each hedge fund holding (including hedge fund of funds) since University of Kentucky Endowment's initial investment up to 1Q26.
14.	Month by Month Contributions to each hedge fund holding (including hedge fund of funds) since University of Kentucky Endowment's initial investment up to 1Q26.
15.	Month by Month Returns (net of fees) earned by University of Kentucky Endowment for each hedge fund holding (including hedge fund of funds) since initial investment up to 1Q26.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kelly Lyles

title: PitchBook Data FOIA Request: University of Missouri

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

I am currently seeking updated quarterly performance data from your plan’s alternative asset holdings for the following date(s): 4Q19,4Q25 & 1Q26.

9.	Date as of which all the above data was calculated.

I also request a copy of any disclosable documents which contain some or all of the following information:

13.	Month by Month Market Value for each hedge fund holding (including hedge fund of funds) since University of Missouri's initial investment up to 1Q26.
14.	Month by Month Contributions to each hedge fund holding (including hedge fund of funds) since University of Missouri's initial investment up to 1Q26.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kelly Lyles

title: PitchBook Data FOIA Request: Pocono Mountain Regional Police Pension Plan

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am currently seeking updated quarterly performance data from your plan’s alternative asset holdings for the following date(s): 1Q15,2Q15,3Q15,4Q15,1Q16,2Q16,3Q16,4Q16,1Q17,2Q17,3Q17,4Q17,1Q18,2Q18,3Q18,4Q18,1Q19,2Q19,3Q19,4Q19,1Q20,2Q20,3Q20,4Q20,1Q21,2Q21,3Q21,4Q23,3Q25,4Q25 & 1Q26.
As always, thank you in advance for taking the time to send the requested documents. Below is the formal request.
On behalf of PitchBook Data, Inc., under Pennsylvania Right to Know Law, I request a copy of the quarterly public records from 1Q15,2Q15,3Q15,4Q15,1Q16,2Q16,3Q16,4Q16,1Q17,2Q17,3Q17,4Q17,1Q18,2Q18,3Q18,4Q18,1Q19,2Q19,3Q19,4Q19,1Q20,2Q20,3Q20,4Q20,1Q21,2Q21,3Q21,4Q23,3Q25,4Q25 & 1Q26 for the following information, preferably in Excel or PDF format.
1.	Names and vintage years of all private equity, venture capital, mezzanine, distressed, real estate/REIT, debt and infrastructure partnerships in Pocono Mountain Regional Police Pension Plan's portfolio.
2.	Commitments made to each partnership.
3.	Contributions drawn down since inception.
4.	Distributions made to Pocono Mountain Regional Police Pension Plan to date by each individual partnership.
5.	Net Asset Value of each partnership.
6.	Internal rates of return (IRRs) for each partnership with and without the use of credit facility. Please note if the IRRs are not net.
7.	Investment multiple (TV/PI) for each individual partnership.
8.	The dollar amount of “total management fees and costs paid” for each individual partnership.
9.	Date as of which all the above data was calculated.
10.	Names of all alternative asset partnerships partially and fully sold by Pocono Mountain Regional Police Pension Plan, including date of sale.
11.	For each fund, please indicate whether or not the fund uses Subscription Credit Facilities.
I also request a copy of any disclosable documents which contain some or all of the following information:
12.	Names of all hedge fund holdings (including hedge fund of funds) in Pocono Mountain Regional Police Pension Plan's portfolio.
13.	Month by Month Market Value for each hedge fund holding (including hedge fund of funds) since Pocono Mountain Regional Police Pension Plan's initial investment up to 1Q26.
14.	Month by Month Contributions to each hedge fund holding (including hedge fund of funds) since Pocono Mountain Regional Police Pension Plan's initial investment up to 1Q26.
15.	Month by Month Returns (net of fees) earned by Pocono Mountain Regional Police Pension Plan for each hedge fund holding (including hedge fund of funds) since initial investment up to 1Q26.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kelly Lyles

title: OPM/DOGE "What Did You Do Last Week?" Employee Accomplishment Reporting Records (February–March 2025)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Freedom of Information Act Request

Drug Enforcement Administration
Freedom of Information/Records Management Section

Re: OPM/DOGE "What Did You Do Last Week?" Employee Accomplishment Reporting Records (February–March 2025)

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, I request the following records:

1. Copies of any email, memorandum, directive, instruction, or communication received by DEA employees between February 21, 2025 and March 7, 2025 relating to requests that federal employees report their weekly accomplishments, including but not limited to emails bearing the subject lines:

   • "What did you do last week?"
   • "What did you do last week? Part II"

2. Copies of any responses submitted by DEA employees between February 22, 2025 and March 7, 2025 in response to the above-described accomplishment-reporting requests.

3. Copies of any DEA-wide guidance, legal review, management directive, talking points, Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs), policy memoranda, or internal communications created, sent, or received between February 21, 2025 and March 14, 2025 concerning whether DEA personnel should respond to the requests.

4. Any records reflecting:
   a. The number of DEA employees who received the requests;
   b. The number who responded;
   c. The number who failed to respond;
   d. Any tracking, compliance, disciplinary, or follow-up measures associated with the requests.

5. Any records concerning the collection, review, storage, analysis, dissemination, retention, or use of employee responses submitted between February 22, 2025 and March 14, 2025.

6. Any communications between DEA personnel and the Office of Personnel Management (OPM), the Executive Office of the President, DOGE personnel, the Department of Justice, or any other federal agency regarding implementation, compliance, legal review, or handling of the accomplishment-reporting requests between February 21, 2025 and March 14, 2025.

To the extent that responsive records contain personal identifying information, I request that such information be redacted and that all reasonably segregable portions be released.

The requested records concern the operation and management of the federal government and will contribute significantly to public understanding of government activities. I therefore request a waiver of all fees. In the alternative, please notify me if fees are expected to exceed $25.

The records should be provided electronically.

Requested Action if Records Are Withheld:
• Conduct a de novo review of withheld materials;
• Release all non-exempt and segregable portions of the records;
• Provide a detailed justification or Vaughn index explaining the application of each exemption;
• Reconsider whether any redacted content can be released in light of the public interest.

Respectfully,

William Fernandes

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

William Fernandes
